festival.title: Film Festival Programme
notes: Use only the information provided in this JSON.
Do not invent missing director names, duration, synopsis, or logline.
Entries with null values need verification before publishing as final film metadata.

items.title: Laxmi
items.synopsis: A socially rooted Odia film connected with the cultural and devotional imagination around Lakshmi.
items.logline: A classic Odia narrative where faith, social order, and moral reform come into conflict.

items.title: Lahari
items.synopsis: In rural Odisha, an elderly fisherman's life is shaken when his son's wish for a doll challenges traditional gender expectations.
items.logline: A father must confront his own beliefs when his child's desire exposes the fragility of tradition.

items.title: Magunira Shagada
items.synopsis: An ageing bullock-cart driver struggles to survive as buses and modern transport make his livelihood obsolete.
items.logline: A man left behind by modernity fights a losing battle against change, poverty, and personal tragedy.

items.title: White Snow
items.synopsis: A Kashmiri mother travels through remote mountain villages to secretly screen her son's banned film.
items.logline: A mother risks everything to keep her son's artistic voice alive in a world that tries to silence it.

items.title: Do Bigha Zamin
items.synopsis: A poor farmer goes to the city to earn money and save his small plot of land from being taken away.
items.logline: A dispossessed farmer becomes a rickshaw puller in the city in a desperate attempt to reclaim his land and dignity.

items.title: Kandeelu – The Ray of Hope
items.synopsis: A poor farmer's family faces loss, hardship, and socio-political pressure in rural Karnataka.
items.logline: A farming family searches for hope while caught between grief, injustice, and survival.

items.title: A Story That Refused to Die
Konttho
items.synopsis: A popular radio jockey loses his voice after throat cancer and must rebuild his life through speech therapy.
items.logline: A man known for his voice must rediscover himself after the very thing that defined him is taken away.

items.title: Bandini
items.synopsis: A woman serving a life sentence for murder reflects on love, sacrifice, and the choices that led her to prison.
items.logline: In a prison, a woman must choose between a compassionate future and the unresolved love of her past.

items.title: Semkhor
items.synopsis: In a remote Dimasa community, a widowed mother confronts cruel traditions while trying to protect a newborn child.
items.logline: A woman challenges inherited customs to save a child and create the possibility of a new dawn.

items.title: Sabar Bonda
items.synopsis: Anand returns to his rural hometown after a family death and reconnects romantically with a childhood friend.
items.logline: A man's return home becomes a quiet journey of grief, love, identity, and self-acceptance.

items.title: Jagat
items.synopsis: A police sub-inspector investigates the disappearance of a twelve-year-old boy and uncovers a darker truth.
items.logline: A missing-child case forces a patient investigator to confront a truth more sinister than expected.

items.title: Sujata
items.synopsis: An adopted woman from an oppressed caste grows up in a Brahmin household and faces love, prejudice, and acceptance.
items.logline: A woman's dignity and love challenge the caste boundaries that define the family that raised her.

items.title: Juiphool
items.synopsis: Two mothers from the Assam-Nagaland border form a secret bond amid ethnic conflict and village suspicion.
items.logline: Across a fragile borderland, two women create a bond that unsettles a community shaped by fear.

items.title: Lal Odhani
items.synopsis: A love story that explores the relationship between the individual and the state.
items.logline: Romance becomes a way to examine personal freedom, political pressure, and the limits of belonging.

items.title: Ullozhukku
items.synopsis: In flood-hit Kerala, a pregnant widow and her mother-in-law face grief, secrets, and delayed funeral rites.
items.logline: Two women trapped by floodwater and family truths must confront grief, shame, and the possibility of release.

items.title: Amada Bata
items.synopsis: Based on Basanta Kumari Patnaik's novel, the film follows Maya before and after marriage.
items.logline: A woman's life and marriage become the centre of a classic Odia story about society, expectation, and inner resolve.
